nodes.name: ageoa.mcmc_foundational.kthohr_mcmc.mala
nodes.conceptual_summary: Grouped atoms sharing an upstream family or module.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: Replaces singleton atom subpackages with a flat module layout.

nodes.name: mala_proposal_adjustment
nodes.description: Calculates the adjustment term for a Metropolis-Adjusted Langevin Algorithm (MALA) proposal. This typically involves the gradient of the log-posterior (via mala_mean_fn), which guides the proposal distribution.
nodes.type_signature: (step_size: float, vals_bound: np.ndarray, mala_mean_fn: drift oracle) -> np.ndarray
nodes.conceptual_summary: Direct callable atom in the consolidated module.
nodes.critic_notes: Signature derived from the Python wrapper definition.
